languages.text: "Вот уж и она, Погонщица. Здоровенная гадина... Тут можно спуститься с двух сторон. Вон там — подход сразу к цветку, это та еще пакость, ядовитыми облаками брызжет. А с другой стороны нарост — эта штука разбухает и мух хищных выплевывает. Откуда заходить будем?"

"There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"
languages.original_text: "Вот уж и она, Погонщица. Здоровенная гадина... Тут можно спуститься с двух сторон. Вон там — подход сразу к цветку, это та еще пакость, ядовитыми облаками брызжет. А с другой стороны нарост — эта штука разбухает и мух хищных выплевывает. Откуда заходить будем?"

"There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

"I can see two ways down. That way leads straight to the flower, the abomination that sprays out spores. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews swarms of flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

"There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down here. That way leads straight to a flower, the abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

"There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

languages.text: 「2つの道が見える。1つは花へ通じ、胞子を散らす化け物。もう1つは、膨らんで肉食のハエを吐き出すものへ通じる。どちらの道を通るべきか？」
languages.original_text: "I can see two ways down. That way leads straight to the flower, the abomination that sprays out spores. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews swarms of flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

traits.locale_text: 「2つの道が見える。1つは花へ通じ、胞子を散らす abomination。もう1つは、膨らんで肉食のハエを吐き出すものへ通じる。どちらの道を通るべきか？」

languages.text: "İşte Çoban. İri bir yaratık... Aşağıya inen iki yol var. Şu yol doğrudan çiçeğe, zehirli bulutlar püskürten o ucube şeye çıkıyor. Diğer yol ise şişen ve et yiyen sinekler kusan bir ura gidiyor. Hangi rotayı izlememi istersiniz?"
languages.original_text: "There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

traits.locale_text: "İşte Çoban. İri bir yaratık... Aşağıya inen iki yol var. Şu yol doğrudan çiçeğe, zehirli bulutlar püskürten o ucube şeye çıkıyor. Diğer yol ise şişen ve et yiyen sinekler kusan bir ura gidiyor. Hangi rotayı izlememi istersiniz?"

languages.text: «Ahí está el Pastor. Menuda bestia... Veo dos maneras de bajar. Por ahí se llega directamente hasta la flor, la abominación que escupe las nubes tóxicas. Y ese otro camino conduce a un brote que se hincha y libera enjambres de moscas devoradoras de carne. ¿Por dónde quiere que baje?».
languages.original_text: "There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

traits.locale_text: «Ahí está el Pastor. Menuda bestia... Veo dos maneras de bajar. Por ahí se llega directamente hasta la flor, la abominación que escupe las nubes tóxicas. Y ese otro camino conduce a un brote que se hincha y libera enjambres de moscas devoradoras de carne. ¿Por dónde quiere que baje?».

languages.text: “那就是拒生花。真是个大家伙……从这里下去有两条路。一条直通那朵花，那个喷毒雾的怪物。另一条则通向增生体，它会肿胀并吐出食肉蝇。您想让我走哪条？”
languages.original_text: "There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

traits.locale_text: “那就是拒生花。真是个大家伙……从这里下去有两条路。一条直通那朵花，那个喷毒雾的怪物。另一条则通向增生体，它会肿胀并吐出食肉蝇。您想让我走哪条？”

languages.text: « Voilà le Chasseur. Une imposante créature... Deux passages s'offrent à nous : le premier mène droit à une fleur, une abomination qui répand des nuages toxiques, tandis que le second débouche près d'une excroissance qui enfle et crache régulièrement des mouches dévoreuses de chair. Quel itinéraire voulez-vous que j'emprunte ? »
languages.original_text: "There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà le Chasseur. Une imposante créature... Deux passages s'offrent à nous : le premier mène droit à une fleur, une abomination qui répand des nuages toxiques, tandis que le second débouche près d'une excroissance qui enfle et crache régulièrement des mouches dévoreuses de chair. Quel itinéraire voulez-vous que j'emprunte ? »

languages.text: "Da ist er, der Treiber. Ein übles Biest ... Von hier führen zwei Wege nach unten. Der Weg dort führt direkt zu einer Blume, einer Abscheulichkeit, die giftige Wolken erzeugt. Und der andere Weg führt zu einem Auswuchs, der Fleisch fressende Fliegen ausspeit. Welche Route soll ich nehmen?"
languages.original_text: "There it is, the Drover. Hefty beast... There are two ways down from here. That way leads straight to a flower, an abomination that sprays out poisonous clouds. And the other way leads to a growth that swells and spews flesh-eating flies. What route do you want me to take?"
